title: Endpoint Overview
content_html:
Docs Viewer Endpoint Overview

Docs Viewer local endpoints are JSON APIs served by the Docs Viewer service. Canonical management endpoint constants live in docs-viewer/services/docs_management_routes.py; integrated document-package constants live in docs-viewer/services/docs_document_package_routes.py; independently gated Docs Review constants live in docs-viewer/services/docs_review_routes.py.

GET Endpoints

Endpoint Child doc Purpose
GET /health Health And Capabilities Probe service availability.
GET /capabilities Health And Capabilities Report enabled management features and per-scope availability.
GET /docs/index-tree Generated Read Endpoints Return generated scope tree JSON.
GET /docs/recent Generated Read Endpoints Return the route-configured Recent JSON.
GET /docs/doc Generated Read Endpoints Return one generated document payload.
GET /docs/search Generated Read Endpoints Return generated docs-search JSON.
GET /docs/references Generated Read Endpoints Return generated semantic-reference index JSON.
GET /docs/reference-target Generated Read Endpoints Return generated semantic-reference target JSON.
GET /docs/source-config Source Config Endpoints Return the Docs Viewer source-config report.
GET /docs/source-config-settings Source Config Endpoints Return the settings edit contract.
GET /docs/source Source Editor Endpoints Return Markdown body text and a revision token for one source doc.
GET /docs/staged-media-files Source Editor Endpoints List staged image or opaque-file choices for source-editor insertion.
GET /docs/import-source-files Create And Import Endpoints List staged document sources and trusted collections that can be imported into docs source.
GET /docs/publish/status Public Scopes Report pending public-scope local-to-public changes.

Document Package GET Endpoints

These management-only endpoints support the manage Prepare package and Review package Actions owned by Share Document Packages.

Endpoint Purpose
GET /docs/packages/config Return fixed package profiles, scopes, actions, and external-workspace availability.
GET /docs/packages/documents?scope=<scope> Return selectable source documents for Prepare.
GET /docs/packages/returned?scope=<scope> List trusted active-scope return-import packages plus blocked and unassigned evidence; the Review package modal projects only reviewable files.

Docs Review GET Endpoints

The complete independently gated contract lives in Docs Review Endpoints.

Endpoint Purpose
GET /docs-review/capabilities Report review workspace availability and review-only authority.
GET /docs-review/packages List validated packages and rejected-package diagnostics.
GET /docs-review/packages/manifest Read one trusted validated manifest.
GET /docs-review/packages/assets Read optional package inventories.
GET /docs-review/packages/assets-content/<package>/<path> Serve one safe inventoried package asset.
GET /docs-review/packages/index-tree Read one package-local generated tree.
GET /docs-review/packages/payload Read one package-local generated document payload.

POST Endpoints

Endpoint Child doc Action
POST /docs/source-config-settings Source Config Endpoints Apply allowlisted source-config settings and rebuild docs output when needed.
POST /docs/source/rebuild Source Editor Endpoints Replace one source doc body, preserving front matter, then rebuild affected outputs.
POST /docs/staged-media-preview Source Editor Endpoints Preview logical media identity and new/unchanged/replace collision state without writing.
POST /docs/staged-media-apply Source Editor Endpoints Publish verified staged media and return Markdown for insertion into the active buffer.
POST /docs/open-source Source Editor Endpoints Open one source Markdown file in a local editor.
POST /docs/create Create And Import Endpoints Create a new source Markdown doc.
POST /docs/import-source Create And Import Endpoints Import a staged file into docs source.
POST /docs/rebuild Rebuild And Audit Endpoints Rebuild generated docs and docs-search for one scope.
POST /docs/broken-links Rebuild And Audit Endpoints Run a missing-target audit for one docs scope.
POST /docs/update-metadata Source Mutation Endpoints Update supported front matter fields for one source doc.
POST /docs/move Source Mutation Endpoints Change one doc's parent without moving the source file.
POST /docs/delete-preview Source Mutation Endpoints Preview blockers and warnings before deleting one source doc.
POST /docs/delete-apply Source Mutation Endpoints Delete one source Markdown file after confirmation and validation.
POST /docs/scopes/create-preview Scope Lifecycle Endpoints Preview files and config changes for a new scope.
POST /docs/scopes/create-apply Scope Lifecycle Endpoints Create a new manifest-owned scope after confirmation.
POST /docs/scopes/delete-preview Scope Lifecycle Endpoints Preview deletion of a manifest-owned scope.
POST /docs/scopes/delete-apply Scope Lifecycle Endpoints Delete a manifest-owned scope after confirmation.
POST /docs/publish/confirm Public Scopes Confirm the local-to-site-asset diff for one public scope without writing.
POST /docs/publish/apply Public Scopes Copy local published docs/search to public route site assets after confirm: true.

Viewability changes use POST /docs/update-metadata; there is no dedicated single or bulk viewability API.

Document Package POST Endpoints

Endpoint Action
POST /docs/packages/prepare Validate or write one JSON/JSONL package for an explicit source-document set.
POST /docs/packages/context Validate or update the allowlisted external-context copy for one fixed profile.
POST /docs/packages/returned/review Materialize the complete validated content package for read-only Docs Review.

Prepare Package documents its manage Action on GET /docs/; Review package is composed in the same Actions menu. There is no separate package browser route or inspect endpoint. Requests reject generic adapter fields and record_indices; the returned workflow has no partial-record contract. Canonical returned-package mutation uses the normal POST /docs/import-source whole-package plan and confirmation.

Docs Review POST Endpoints

Endpoint Child doc Action
POST /docs-review/packages/build Docs Review Endpoints Repair missing or malformed generated output inside one validated package; healthy output is unchanged.

All JSON responses are sent with Cache-Control: no-store.
